mapper.select: select id, field_id, module_id, component_id, component_code, field_code, default_title, locale, display_title, placeholder, help_text, component_type, data_path, value_type, required_flag, sort, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, note from sys_module_field_title where field_id = #{fieldId} and locale = #{locale} limit 1

select id, field_id, module_id, component_id, component_code, field_code, default_title, locale, display_title, placeholder, help_text, component_type, data_path, value_type, required_flag, sort, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, note from sys_module_field_title where module_id = #{moduleId} and locale = #{locale} order by sort asc, field_id asc
mapper.update: update sys_module_field_title set display_title = #{displayTitle}, placeholder = #{placeholder}, help_text = #{helpText}, status = #{status, typeHandler=com.soli.common.core.mybatis.handler.DbEnumTypeHandler}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id}

update sys_module_field_title set module_id = #{moduleId}, component_id = #{componentId}, component_code = #{componentCode}, field_code = #{fieldCode}, default_title = #{defaultTitle}, component_type = #{componentType, typeHandler=com.soli.common.core.mybatis.handler.DbEnumTypeHandler}, data_path = #{dataPath}, value_type = #{valueType, typeHandler=com.soli.common.core.mybatis.handler.DbEnumTypeHandler}, required_flag = #{requiredFlag, typeHandler=com.soli.common.core.mybatis.handler.DbEnumTypeHandler}, sort = #{sort}, status = #{status, typeHandler=com.soli.common.core.mybatis.handler.DbEnumTypeHandler}, note = #{note}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} where field_id = #{fieldId} and locale = #{locale}
